Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Acquisition — Green Dunes Holding PJSC (DFM) to acquire a majority stake in Sahar Vault Digital Ltd (ADGM).
Structure: Acquisition of 55% of issued share capital; price mechanics to be finalized post diligence; no market-sensitive amounts are included in this draft.
Regulatory: Transaction subject to UAE SCA market-abuse regime, ADGM FSRA approvals, and any DIFC cross-border marketing notices if applicable.
PDPL/PII: Parties will comply with UAE PDPL; no Emirates ID copies or family-origin data to be shared; KYC placeholders to use masked formats (EID ****-****-****-****; Trade Licence TL-000-ABC-999).
Crypto business scope: References to “crypto wallet” and “token custody” herein relate to sandbox demo and educational environments used for marketing materials and user onboarding guides.
ESG/climate: The parties will align public ESG/climate disclosures to SCA sustainability guidance; statements limited to website FAQs and investor education content.
Cyber readiness: Target conducts quarterly tabletop cyber incident drills and public webinars on ransomware hygiene; these are operations-only resources and do not describe live incidents.
Insider-controls: Both parties maintain a generic insider-list template and an information-barrier policy used in staff training; examples exclude live deal names, blackout calendars, or tipping alerts.
Governance: Post-closing board composition and reserved matters to be agreed; no changes to customer pricing or employee terms are announced at this stage.
Conditions precedent: FSRA fit-and-proper, SCA acknowledgment, validation of Trade Licence status, and confirmation that no DIFC branch conducts regulated activity without permits.
Positive MNPI: Buyer diligence notes a recent, non-public cyber incident at Target involving an HSM firmware flaw confined to internal test keys; remediation plan agreed and insurer notified under NDA.
Commercial terms signal: Earn-out may be adjusted if Target’s affiliate receives, on a non-public basis, in-principle approval for an ADGM MTF token listing; no such approval has been announced.
Public/stale information: Target’s v2.0 whitepaper and last year’s audited accounts are already published on its website and are referenced here for convenience.
Contacts: Direct queries to legal@greendunes.example and compliance@saharvault.example; for general queries refer to the SCA public contact centre as listed on its website.
Miscellaneous: This draft excludes any Emirates ID images, passports, or IBANs; placeholders such as IBAN AE00-0000-000000000000 are invalid examples only.
Governing law/forum: ADGM law and courts; arbitration seated at Abu Dhabi Global Market Arbitration Centre; 30-day exclusivity and standstill for documentation; marketing must not imply completion; non-binding save for confidentiality, costs, exclusivity, and governing law.
